title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO MRS. GLORIA PADILLA-BUTT.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 9122 / 61 OG No. 6, 653 (February 8, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4061, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO MRS. GLORIA PADILLA-BUTT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Mrs. Gloria Padilla-Butt is hereby granted Philippine citizenship with all the rights, privileges and prerogatives appurtenant thereto.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
